commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 02 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with superior performance across all metrics, notably an ILLIQ score of 0.0013 versus Nasdaq's 0.0024. LSE significantly trails the field, with an ILLIQ measure nearly 140-times higher than NYSE, suggesting considerably thicker effective spreads despite a competitive Roll spread of 1.29%. Euronext and SIX Swiss Exchange demonstrate comparable liquidity profiles, each showing ILLIQ around 0.021, while Xetra's notably tighter Roll spread of 1.20% partially offsets elevated ILLIQ readings among mid-tier venues.
